home.heroSubtitle: Creating smart, intuitive mobile applications that make life easier

zulistCard.title: ZuList
zulistCard.description: Smart shopping list app with real-time collaboration, offline support, and intelligent product recommendations.

zulist.title: ZuList - Smart Shopping List
zulist.description: A Flutter-based shopping list application with real-time collaboration, offline support, and smart product recommendations
zulist.fullDescription: ZuList is a modern shopping list app designed to make grocery shopping easier and more collaborative. Create shared lists with family and friends, get smart product suggestions, and manage your shopping efficiently - even offline.

features.title: Key Features
features.realtimeDesc: Share lists with family and friends, see updates instantly as they happen
features.offlineDesc: Works seamlessly even without internet connection, syncs when you're back online
features.smartDesc: AI-powered recommendations to help you find products faster
features.multilangDesc: Available in English and Hebrew with full RTL support
features.firebaseDesc: Secure cloud sync with Firebase for reliable data storage
features.profileDesc: Optimized profile images and user management
features.categoriesDesc: Organize your shopping by categories for better efficiency

infoCollection.title: 1. Information We Collect
infoCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, use our services, or contact us for support. This may include your name, email address, profile image, and shopping list data.

infoUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
infoUse.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, and communicate with you. Your shopping lists are synced across your devices and shared with people you invite.

infoSharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
infoSharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as described in this policy. Your shopping lists are only shared with people you explicitly invite.

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard protocols.

yourRights.title: 5. Your Rights
yourRights.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of certain communications from us. You can manage your data directly through the app settings.

contactUs.title: 6. Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using ZuList, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

useLicense.title: 2. Use License
useLicense.content: Permission is granted to download and use ZuList for personal, non-commercial purposes. This license does not include the right to modify, reverse engineer, or redistribute the application.

disclaimer.title: 3. Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The materials on ZuList are provided on an 'as is' basis. ZuList makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including implied warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.

limitations.title: 4. Limitations
limitations.content: In no event shall ZuList or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on ZuList, even if ZuList has been notified of the possibility of such damage.

accuracy.title: 5. Accuracy of Materials
accuracy.content: The materials appearing on ZuList could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. ZuList does not warrant that any of the materials on its app are accurate, complete, or current.

links.title: 6. Links
links.content: ZuList has not reviewed all of the sites linked to our app and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by ZuList.

modifications.title: 7. Modifications
modifications.content: ZuList may revise these terms of service at any time without notice. By using this app, you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these terms of service.

contactInfo.title: 8. Contact Information
contactInfo.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at
